task_description: discover all SQLite databases in the current directory tree, inspect their schemas, identify the largest tables, generate a schema summary, and save it to Markdown
code:
for db in $(cat sqlite_databases.txt); do
    echo "Inspecting $db"
    sqlite3 "$db" ".schema" >> schemas.sql
done
